productDisplayName: Nike Women Strong Poly Black Capri
description: CompositionDark grey capris made of Dri-Fit polyester with orange ribs around the waist as a fitting reinforcement, soft waistband with a concealed pocket on the inside, double stitch around the groin for durability and heat transfer swoosh logoFittingSlimWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursUse mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry inside-out in shade Cool iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry cleanYour training sessions will now be even more peaceful and comfortable with these capris from nike. The soft and wide waistband sits perfectly on your waist without irritating your skin. The capris will keep you dry and fresh even after a gruelling session of yoga or aerobics, with its Dri-fit technology. When you are not at the gym, pair it with a light and bright tee and chill it out.
